title: Rhodax ambiguus
taxonomy: Rhodax ambiguus is classified within the family Rhodophyllideae, which belongs to the order Rhodymeniales, and is part of the class Florideophyceae. This classification places it within the red algae group. The Florideophyceae class is further grouped under the phylum Rhodophyta, which includes various species of red algae. Rhodax ambiguus' exact classification is within the rhodophytes, a group known for their complex life cycles and photosynthetic capabilities. It is considered an interesting example of the diverse and widespread red algae.
